Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given several tables and need to create an event log for process mining. Steps: 1. Well use order_id as the case ID. 2. Well derive events from each table

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Orders: Order Created timestamp: order_date resource: sales_person_id Order Lines: Item Picked for each line item timestamp: item_picking_date resource: picker_id Delivery: Order Dispatched and Order Arrived timestamps: delivery_dispatch_date and delivery_arrival_date resource: carrier_id Invoice: Invoice Issued timestamp: invoice_issue_date resource: billing_person_id Payments: Payment Received timestamp: payment_date

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to map timestamps appropriately. For each order we have multiple events and we must order them by timestamp. Well combine data by linking through order_id and for payments through invoice_id to order_id

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For Payments resource: payment_method or we can use payment_id as actor but typically the actor is the system or the payer. However the table doesnt specify who made the payment. Well use the payment_method as the resource for the payment event

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Well enrich with resources: we have resource tables that give names for the IDs well map the resource ID to the resource name from Resources table. For each event type: Order Created Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Well create a list of events each event is a dictionary with case_id activity timestamp resource and then additional attributes as key-value pairs. Well then sort the entire list by case_id and then timestamp

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets go through each table and generate events. Note: Some orders may have multiple deliveries invoices and payments. We need to include all. For each order list all events and verify chronological order like for order 1001 1002 etc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now we have all events. Well sort by Case ID and then Timestamp. List them in order per case ensuring every event for every order_id is included and chronological correctness
